name: Action Figure Collector
description: Spends their spare cash on mint-condition collectibles. Highly relatable to a specific niche.

name: Anime
description: A self-proclaimed fan of Japanese animation. Great for connecting with a dedicated subculture.

name: Baking
description: Loves making cookies and bread for the other contestants. Makes them the 'heart' of the dorm.

name: Basketball
description: Spent their youth on the court. Brings teamwork and physical endurance.

name: Board Games
description: Loves a game night. Shows off their competitive yet strategic mind.

name: Bowling
description: A classic social hobby. Shows they are a 'regular guy' who enjoys a night out.

name: Calligraphy
description: Possesses incredibly steady hands and a disciplined, artistic eye.

name: Can collector
description: An odd hobby of keeping unique soda or energy drink cans. Producers love this 'quirk'.

name: Card collector
description: Loves trading cards. Shows a high level of patience and focus on value.

name: Chatting
description: Can talk to anyone about anything. They are the primary source of 'room noise' for the show.

name: Chewing gum
description: Rarely seen without a piece of gum. Gives them a 'cool, casual' visual on camera.

name: Chill
description: They just want to relax and keep the vibes positive. No drama, just vibes.

name: Coin collector
description: A very traditional and quiet hobby. Suggests an old-school, stable personality.

name: Comics
description: A fan of superhero lore and graphic novels. Highly relatable to the core demographic.

name: Cooking
description: The 'Mom' of the dorms. Keeps everyone fed and happy during long filming days.

name: Cracking joints
description: A nervous or physical habit. Producers often include the sound effect for comedic timing.

name: Crossword puzzles
description: Keeps their mind sharp between rehearsals. High focus and vocabulary.

name: Cycling
description: Enjoys long rides to clear their head. Suggests high endurance and mental clarity.

name: Doodling
description: Always drawing on the margins of their lyric sheets. Highly creative and distracted.

name: Drawing
description: A serious artistic pursuit. They often draw portraits of their fellow contestants.

name: Drinking
description: Loves the party scene. A major risk factor for scandals, but gold for the editors.

name: Fashion design
description: Loves customizing their own clothes. Always looks like a star.

name: Fishing
description: A hobby that requires extreme patience. Very unusual for a pop star.

name: Foodie
description: Lives to eat. They are the best at doing 'food reactions' during variety segments.

name: Gambling
description: Loves high stakes and taking risks. Can lead to intense competitive drama.

name: Gardening
description: Loves tending to plants. Suggests a nurturing and patient soul.

name: Going to the beach
description: A classic summer hobby. Great for 'vacation' themed photoshoots.

name: Graphic Designer
description: Professionally minded and tech-savvy. They understand branding better than most.

name: Gym
description: Dedicated to the iron. High physical standards and stamina.

name: Had a band
description: Previously played in a local band. Understands live performance dynamics.

name: Jogging
description: A daily routine to stay fit and clear the mind.

name: Journaling
description: Writes down their thoughts every night. Suggests high sincerity and self-reflection.

name: Karate
description: Trained in martial arts. Adds a disciplined and 'stunt-ready' edge to their dancing.

name: Knitting
description: A very slow, methodical hobby. Shows a calm and focused demeanor.

name: LEGO sets
description: Loves building complex models. Suggests high patience and spatial awareness.

name: Magic
description: Loves performing sleight-of-hand. Great for 'wowing' the camera and fans.

name: Movies
description: A total film buff. Constantly quoting famous lines.

name: Music producer
description: Spends their time on a laptop making beats. Shows high technical skill and ambition.

name: Nap
description: Can sleep anywhere, anytime. Often edited as the 'lazy but cute' member.

name: Origami
description: The art of paper folding. Shows high discipline and delicate motor skills.

name: Painting
description: An expressive, colorful hobby. Shows a deep, artistic personality.

name: Party planning
description: Always organizing the group's social calendar. Natural leader vibes.

name: Photography
description: Always has a camera in hand. They take the best 'behind-the-scenes' photos.

name: Playing cards
description: Good at poker and card games. Strategic and observant.

name: Playing darts
description: Requires a steady hand and high focus. Suggests a consistent performer.

name: Plays bass
description: The foundation of the band. Often quiet but indispensable.

name: Plays drums
description: High energy and perfect rhythm. Brings a 'rock' edge to the group.

name: Plays guitar
description: The classic boy-band interest. Perfect for acoustic 'serenade' segments.

name: Plays piano
description: Classically trained. Suggests high discipline and a sophisticated image.

name: Plays violin
description: Shows extreme dedication and a unique talent in the pop world.

name: Poetry writing
description: A deep, sensitive soul who expresses themselves through verse.

name: Puzzle
description: Loves solving complex problems. Very patient and detail-oriented.

name: Reading
description: Always has their nose in a book. Suggests high intelligence and maturity.

name: Rock Climbing
description: Adventurous and physically strong. Shows high mental and physical grip.

name: Running
description: Classic endurance training. They never seem to run out of breath on stage.

name: Sculpture
description: Loves working with their hands. A very unique and physically demanding art form.

name: Shoe collector
description: Obsessed with sneakers and footwear. Very high visual and trend awareness.

name: Sleeping
description: Their favorite hobby is staying in bed. Relatable but can look unmotivated.

name: Sports
description: A general love for all things athletic. The 'all-arounder' athlete.

name: Stretching
description: Obsessed with flexibility. Makes them an incredible dancer with zero injury risk.

name: Sunbathing
description: Loves the sun and the outdoors. Suggests a laid-back, visual-focused personality.

name: Surfing
description: The 'cool beach boy' archetype. Very popular for summer-themed groups.

name: Swimming
description: Excellent lung capacity and full-body strength.

name: T-shirt making
description: Loves DIY fashion. They often make custom shirts for the whole team.

name: Table tennis
description: Requires lightning-fast reflexes. Great for high-energy variety segments.

name: Talking on the phone
description: Always calling home or friends. A very social and homesick personality.

name: Traveling
description: Loves seeing new places. Highly curious and open-minded.

name: Tutoring
description: Used to help others with their studies. Natural mentor/leader potential.

name: TV Shows
description: A fan of binge-watching dramas and sitcoms. Very relatable to the audience.

name: Vinyl collector
description: A music purist. They value the classics and high-quality sound.

name: Volunteering
description: Spends their time helping others. High sincerity and public appeal.

name: Walking
description: Enjoys simple, long walks. A very grounded and calm individual.

name: Watches collector
description: Appreciates luxury and precision. Suggests an ambitious, professional image.

name: Wine tasting
description: A sophisticated hobby. Suggests a more mature, refined personality.

name: Yoga
description: Focuses on flexibility and mental peace. High resilience and body control.

name: Video Games
description: A hardcore gamer. High reflexes and very relatable to the fans.

name: Acrobatics
description: Loves doing backflips in the grass. A high-risk hobby that makes for incredible stage stunts.

name: Acting
description: Spends time in drama workshops. Helps with 'emotive' performances and camera awareness.

name: Antiques
description: Loves hunting for old trinkets and furniture. Suggests a mature, old-soul personality.

name: Astronomy
description: Spends nights with a telescope. A romantic, thoughtful interest that fans find dreamy.

name: Barista Skills
description: Knows how to make a perfect latte. Great for casual variety show 'coffee shop' segments.

name: Beatboxing
description: Constantly making rhythmic noises. A classic 2000s-era 'talent show' staple.

name: Beekeeping
description: An extremely unusual hobby. Producers find this 'quirky' trait fascinating for interviews.

name: Blogging
description: Keeps a digital diary. Highly interactive with their personal brand and online following.

name: Camping
description: Loves the great outdoors and roughing it. Suggests a rugged, self-reliant nature.

name: Car Restoration
description: Loves getting their hands greasy working on old engines. A very 'masculine' hobby.

name: Chess
description: A strategic thinker who enjoys quiet competition. Seen as the 'brain' of the group.

name: Computer Building
description: A 'tech-geek' who knows their way around a motherboard. Niche but loyal fanbase.

name: Creative Writing
description: Loves crafting stories. Often writes scripts or song lyrics in their spare time.

name: Disc Golf
description: A laid-back, outdoor sport. Shows a casual and approachable personality.

name: DIY Projects
description: Loves making something out of nothing. Very resourceful and creative in the dorm.

name: Dodgeball
description: Loves intense, fast-paced team sports. High energy and competitive spirit.

name: Dog Training
description: Loves animals and understands discipline. Fans melt when they see them with pets.

name: Electronic Music
description: Into synthesizers and DJing. Brings a modern, club-ready vibe to the group.

name: Fencing
description: An elegant and disciplined sport. Suggests a 'noble' or 'sophisticated' image.

name: Flash Mobs
description: Loves organized public performances. Very 2010. Shows a love for performance.

name: Ghost Hunting
description: Enjoys exploring 'haunted' locations. Producers love filming their reactions to scares.

name: Glassblowing
description: A dangerous and beautiful art. Shows high focus and artistic bravery.

name: Street Art
description: Loves graffiti and urban murals. Gives them a 'rebellious' and cool image.

name: Guitar Hero
description: Master of the plastic guitar. A classic era-specific hobby that shows rhythm.

name: Hacky Sack
description: Frequently seen kicking a footbag during breaks. Very casual and friendly hobby.

name: Horseback Riding
description: Suggests a wealthy or 'country-boy' background. Very visual for photoshoots.

name: Ice Skating
description: Possesses incredible balance and grace. Translates well to dance fluidity.

name: Interior Design
description: Always re-arranging the dorm furniture. Great for reality show 'home tour' segments.

name: Jewelry Making
description: Crafts their own accessories. Shows a delicate, detailed artistic side.

name: Juggling
description: A classic 'hidden talent'. Great for lighthearted variety show moments.

name: Karaoke
description: Loves to sing for fun, not just work. Shows high vocal confidence.

name: Kite Surfing
description: Extreme and high-energy. Gives them an 'adrenaline junkie' image.

name: Magic Tricks
description: Loves entertaining peers with card tricks. Keeps the mood light.

name: Meditation
description: Spends time in silence to stay centered. High mental resilience.

name: Metalworking
description: A very intense and physical art form. Suggests strength and dedication.

name: Model Trains
description: A very niche, old-fashioned hobby. Shows an extreme attention to detail.

name: Parkour
description: The peak of 2010 cool. Loves urban climbing and jumping. High visual appeal.

name: Philanthropy
description: Always looking for ways to give back. Makes for a 'hero' edit.

name: Podcasting
description: Early adopter of the format. Loves long-form discussion and interviewing.

name: Pottery
description: A messy but grounding art. Shows a patient and tactile personality.

name: Robotics
description: Into coding and building bots. The 'smart one' of the group.

name: Rollerblading
description: A fun, retro-feeling way to stay active. Great for music video visuals.

name: Sailing
description: Suggests a high-class or adventurous maritime background.

name: Scrapbooking
description: Loves preserving memories. Shows a sentimental and organized nature.

name: Skateboarding
description: The ultimate 'cool guy' hobby. High popularity among younger fans.

name: Stand-up Comedy
description: Not afraid of a tough crowd. High charisma and quick wit.

name: Thrift Shopping
description: Loves the hunt for vintage fashion. Shows an eye for trends and uniqueness.

name: Urban Exploration
description: Loves finding abandoned places. Edgy, curious, and a bit reckless.

name: Vlogging
description: Always has a handheld camera out. Very natural in front of lenses.

name: Woodworking
description: Builds things from scratch. Shows a patient, 'handyman' personality.

name: Skincare Routine
description: Never goes to bed without a 10-step process. Keeps them looking fresh on camera even after 2 hours of sleep.

name: Doing Laundry
description: Actually knows how to separate whites and colors. The hero of the shared dorm space.

name: Instant Ramen Connoisseur
description: Knows exactly how to dress up cheap noodles. Extremely relatable to the average viewer.

name: People Watching
description: Enjoys sitting in cafes or parks just observing. Suggests a thoughtful, introverted nature.

name: Grocery Shopping
description: Loves hunting for deals and stocking the fridge. Shows a grounded, domestic side.

name: Late Night Snacking
description: Always found in the kitchen at 2 AM. Producers love catching them 'cheating' on their diets.

name: Texting
description: Always has their thumbs on a screen. Shows they are highly social and connected.

name: Deep Cleaning
description: Cannot relax if there is dust on the shelves. A polarizing dorm roommate.

name: Sudoku
description: Keeps a book of number puzzles in their bag. Shows a logical, patient mind.

name: Coffee Lover
description: Useless until they've had their first cup. Provides fuel for morning-rehearsal drama.

name: Ironing
description: Takes pride in a crisp shirt. Suggests a meticulous and professional image.

name: Daydreaming
description: Frequently caught staring into space. Seen as the 'creative dreamer' of the group.

name: Taking Selfies
description: Knows their best angles perfectly. A master of social media engagement.

name: Window Shopping
description: Loves looking at things they can't afford yet. Keeps them hungry for success.

name: Drinking Tea
description: A calming ritual. Suggests a sophisticated and composed personality.

name: Stationery Collector
description: Obsessed with pens, notebooks, and stickers. Suggests an organized, 'student' vibe.

name: Power Napping
description: Can fall asleep for 10 minutes and wake up fully energized. A survival show superpower.

name: Saving Money
description: Always looking for a discount. Fans love their frugal, 'started from the bottom' energy.

name: Hair Styling
description: Spends hours on their hair and often helps the other guys with theirs.

name: Digital Organizing
description: Loves keeping their phone and laptop folders perfectly sorted. High attention to detail.

name: Late Night Radio
description: Enjoys the intimacy of radio shows. Often found listening with headphones in bed.

name: Polishing Shoes
description: A classic habit. They want their footwear to be as bright as their future.

name: Morning Stretching
description: Has a set routine every morning. Helps them stay limber for dance rehearsals.

name: Walking Alone
description: Needs 30 minutes of walking alone to function. Suggests a grounded, stable personality.

name: Dorm Pranks
description: Always setting up small traps for the other guys. The 'villain' of dorm life, but a hit on TV.

name: Organizing the Closet
description: Spends free time color-coding hangers and perfectly spacing shirts. Shows an intense need for order.

name: Sharpening Pencils
description: Finds the sound and the perfect point therapeutic. Often seen doing this during long meetings.

name: Opening Package Wrappers
description: Refuses to tear plastic; everything must be opened along the seam. Shows high precision and patience.

name: Peeling Stickers
description: Obsessed with removing labels from bottles and fruit without leaving any residue.

name: Cable Management
description: Cannot stand tangled wires. Will spend an hour fixing the power strips under the dorm TV.

name: Sorting Loose Change
description: Stacks coins by denomination at the end of every day. Suggests a grounded, methodical mind.

name: Matching Socks
description: Spends Sunday mornings pairing every sock in the dorm. A quiet, domestic peacekeeper.

name: Wiping Screens
description: Always carries a microfiber cloth. Cannot tolerate fingerprints on their phone or the laptop.

name: Arranging Toiletries
description: Everything in the bathroom must face the same direction. Shows high visual awareness.

name: Smelling New Books
description: Loves the scent of paper and ink. A strange but endearing habit fans find cute.

name: Checking Expiration Dates
description: Always looks at the bottom of the milk carton. Paranoid but responsible.

name: Folding Receipts
description: Never throws a receipt away without folding it into a perfect square first.

name: Removing Lint
description: Constantly picking stray threads off their own (and others') clothes. High visual focus.

name: Fiddling with Pen Caps
description: A nervous habit of clicking or spinning pen lids. Shows a high-energy, anxious mind.

name: Stacking Objects
description: If there are three books or coasters on a table, they must be stacked perfectly centered.

name: Washing Dishes Immediately
description: Cannot sit down to eat until the pots used to cook are already clean. Very disciplined.

name: Browsing Maps
description: Will look at Google Maps or atlases for hours, memorizing street names and routes.

name: Updating Playlists
description: Obsessed with sorting their iPod or phone music by 'Mood' or 'BPM'.

name: Lining Up Shoes
description: All sneakers in the dorm entryway must be parallel. Shows an orderly, rigid mind.

name: Cleaning Keyboards
description: Uses compressed air and cotton swabs to remove every speck of dust between keys.

name: Watching the Rain
description: Will sit by a window for an hour just following single droplets down the glass.

name: Deleting Emails
description: Cannot stand 'Unread' notifications. Spends time daily achieving 'Inbox Zero'.

name: Trimming Threads
description: Carries a small pair of scissors just to fix loose threads on hoodies or socks.

name: Alphabetizing Media
description: Arranges books and DVDs by title. Shows a very conventional, structured way of thinking.

name: Checking the Locks
description: Must jiggle the dorm door handle exactly three times before going to bed.

name: Smoking
description: Caught behind the studio with a cigarette. A classic rebel trait that ruins their 'clean' image but appeals to edgy fans.

name: Hate-Reading
description: Obsessively scrolling through gossip forums to read negative comments. Destroys mental stability but keeps them 'aware'.

name: Clubbing
description: Loves the nightlife. Often sneaks out of the dorms, risking a massive paparazzi scandal.

name: Social Climbing
description: Only spends time with people who have more followers or influence. Purely transactional friendships.

name: Competitive Dieting
description: Obsessed with being the 'thinnest' in the group. Encourages a toxic dorm environment regarding food.

name: Stealing the Limelight
description: Will physically block others from the camera or jump into their solo shots. Ruthless for screen time.

name: Eavesdropping
description: Listening at the doors of producers and mentors. They always know who is on the chopping block.

name: Pity Fishing
description: Exaggerating injuries or personal tragedies specifically when the cameras are rolling to get the 'Hero' edit.

name: Mirror Fixation
description: Cannot walk past a reflective surface without stopping. Suggests a mix of vanity and deep insecurity.

name: Revenge Planning
description: Keeps a mental (or literal) list of every slight. They don't get mad, they get even.

name: Pocketing Souvenirs
description: A habit of taking small items that don't belong to them (pens, makeup, other guys' lighters). Causes huge dorm friction.

name: High-Stakes Poker
description: Loves gambling with large sums of money. Shows a reckless, adult-focused competitive streak.

name: Obsessive Grooming
description: Plucking, trimming, and fixing their appearance for hours. A symptom of high-pressure visual standards.

name: Flirting for Intel
description: Using their looks to charm junior staff into revealing secret mission details or rankings.

name: Underground Racing
description: Loves the thrill of illegal street racing. A dangerous secret that could end their career in a second.

name: Rumor Spreading
description: Expert at whispering just the right lie to pit two other contestants against each other.

name: Self-Isolation
description: Locks themselves in a closet or bathroom to escape the cameras. Makes producers desperate for a shot.

name: Tattoo Obsession
description: Constantly planning the next piece of ink. Can be controversial with conservative sponsors.

name: Sabotage
description: Not beneath hiding a rival's lucky charm or messing with their alarm clock. Petty and dark.

name: Sleep Martyrdom
description: Boasts about how little they sleep to look like the 'hardest worker'. A toxic work-ethic trait.

name: Arranging Currency
description: Every bill in their wallet must be facing the same direction and sorted by denomination. Suggests a rigid, meticulous mind.

name: Peeling Protective Film
description: Obsessed with peeling the clear plastic off new electronics or equipment. They will wait weeks just to find the 'perfect' moment.

name: Organizing the Fridge
description: Every drink or jar in the dorm fridge must have the label facing directly forward. Causes friction if others are messy.

name: Cleaning Lint Traps
description: Finds a strange satisfaction in cleaning the dryer filter after every single load. Shows a thorough, responsible nature.
